'''Seer Lonnel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] who worked for the [[Helmet Squad]] in [[Desolation Alley]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was a snitch for the Helmet Squad and the Correctional Authority, which was why [[Sebolto]] posted a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on his head to 'shut up' permanently. Seer Lonnel was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] for 1,000 credits sometime after the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|battle of Naboo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
